description: Ecuadorian narcoterrorist cartel based in Guayaquil, founded as 'Los Cubanos' and initially engaged in contract killings. It now handles international drug trafficking, micro-trafficking, extortion, and robbery, providing logistics and security for groups like the Jalisco New Generation Cartel. Considered the second most powerful criminal group in Ecuador after Los Choneros, with whom it fiercely competes for territory. The group recruits young people from marginalized neighborhoods and has operated within the prison system for at least a decade.

country_links.evidence_quote: Los Lagartos prestan servicios logísticos, de acopio de droga y seguridad a traficantes como los del Cartel de Jalisco Nueva Generación de México que paga con dinero, armas, heroína o productos para la venta local.
country_links.context: Los Lagartos provides logistics, drug storage, and security services to the Cartel de Jalisco Nueva Generación of Mexico, which pays with money, weapons, heroin, or products for local sale.
